shortCompanyReason: Reputable local bus operator focused on reliable and safe transport services.
shortRoleReason: Lead and develop operations teams to deliver high-quality, efficient bus services.
advertSummary: Diamond Bus Limited seeks a Senior Operations Supervisor in Oldbury to oversee depot operations, lead teams of supervisors and drivers, ensure compliance, and drive service quality. Offering £45,000+, full-time permanent work, and benefits like free travel and parking.
personalisedIntro: Experienced operations professional with strong leadership and transport industry expertise, ready to drive service quality and team performance for Diamond Bus Limited.
whyThisRole: This role allows me to lead operational teams, improve performance, and ensure safe, reliable transport services while contributing to a well-established local operator.
